name: expandRecurring
_note: calendar.expandRecurring is a LENS_ACTIONS (PATH 3) handler reading the recurrence/startDate/count from artifact.data. It maps freq→interval days (daily 1, weekly 7, biweekly 14, monthly 30, quarterly 91, yearly 365; unknown→7) and emits dated occurrences. FAIL-CLOSED: count is clamped to a 52 safety cap via Math.min(parseInt(count)||10, 52), so an absurd/poisoned count (1e9, Infinity) can never produce an unbounded array. Every occurrence date is a YYYY-MM-DD string. Pure-compute, no STATE/DB/network. macro-assassin drives runMacro (no LENS_ACTIONS resolution); this is the spec for the lens path, with the behavioral suite as the driver.
